zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Iwardby於1477年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾華頓時，她的父親Sir John Iwardby37歲，母親Sanche Carew20歲。她於1498年與Sir John St. John在英國英格蘭維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1553年9月5日在英國英格蘭波克夏普利 奧 坦斯享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Iwardby was born in 1477, in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Iwardby, was 37 and her mother, Sanche Carew, was 20. She married Sir John St. John in 1498, in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 5 September 1553, in Purley on Thames, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

Elle a épousé Sir John St. John en 1498, à Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 septembre 1553, à Purley on Thames, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Iwardbyが1477年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクアイントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Iwardbyは37歳，母Sanche Carewは20歳であった。1498年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアリディアルド トレゴズでSir John St. Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1553年9月5日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアプウルリー オン サムスで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Iwardby(이)가 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 퀄인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Iwardby(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sanche Carew(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 리디아르드 트레고즈에서 Sir John St. John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1553년 9월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 푸를리  섬스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Iwardby nasceu em 1477, em Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Iwardby, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Sanche Carew, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John St. John em 1498, em Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1553, em Purley on Thames, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.Purley on Thames, Berkshire, England, Un: пурли он тамесь, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Iwardby родилась в 1477 г. в местности куеинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Iwardby было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sanche Carew, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John St. John в 1498 г. в местности лидярд трегоз, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 сентября 1553 г. в местности пурли он тамесь, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.of,Lydiard Tregoze,Wiltshire,England: Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Iwardby nació en 1477, en Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Iwardby, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Sanche Carew, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir John St. John en 1498, en Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de septiembre de 1553, en Purley on Thames, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
